stable_visual_summary: Dejah Thoris is a red-skinned Martian noblewoman of high-born status. She possesses an elegant, noble silhouette consistent with her role as a princess. Her appearance varies based on her circumstances, ranging from formal princess attire to specific mourning clothing during periods of intense grief, or appearing as a captive.
costume_signature: Princess attire or high-born noble clothing
personality: Possesses deep intuition and historical knowledge; capable of intense grief.
continuity_constraints: Visual presentation should reflect high-born status unless in a captive or mourning state
